creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is not a new policy.  When I became a committer I was told that the policy was that FreeBSD.org did not want the resposibility to act as upstream for any software other than what we directly provided, e.g. what was under (then) CVS control.  I became a committer quite a few years ago.

If it is not documented in the Porter's Handbook, then that's a bug.
